# fetchurl

> Content-addressable URL caching for CI and package managers. Clients request blobs by algo/hash with source URLs; servers fetch and cache; clients always verify hashes because servers are untrusted.

Website: https://fetchurl.github.io/
Organization: https://github.com/fetchurl

## Normative specification

- Protocol source of truth: https://github.com/fetchurl/spec
- SPEC.md (raw): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fetchurl/spec/main/SPEC.md
- Changelog: https://github.com/fetchurl/spec/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

## Implementations

- Reference server & CLI (Go): https://github.com/fetchurl/fetchurl
- Container image: ghcr.io/fetchurl/fetchurl
- JavaScript SDK: https://github.com/fetchurl/sdk-js
- Python SDK: https://github.com/fetchurl/sdk-python
- Rust SDK: https://github.com/fetchurl/sdk-rust
- Java SDK: https://github.com/fetchurl/sdk-java

## Site documentation (human + agent oriented)

- Getting started: https://fetchurl.github.io/docs/getting-started/
- Protocol overview: https://fetchurl.github.io/docs/protocol/
- Server: https://fetchurl.github.io/docs/server/
- SDKs: https://fetchurl.github.io/docs/sdks/
- Docs index: https://fetchurl.github.io/docs/

## Key concepts for agents

- Env var FETCHURL_SERVER: full base URL(s) ready to append /:algo/:hash. RFC 8941 list if value starts with `"`. Empty/absent disables server support.
- Request: GET {FETCHURL_SERVER}/{algo}/{hash} with header X-Source-Urls as RFC 8941 list of origin URLs.
- Hashes: lowercase hex. Prefer sha256. Algorithms named lowercase [a-z0-9] only (sha1, sha256, sha512 in scope).
- Trust: clients MUST verify content hash; servers MAY abort mid-stream on mismatch; non-graceful end = reject.
- Sources MUST provide Content-Length or server rejects.
- Health: GET {server base}/health — HTTP 200 means OK.
- On real cache hit servers SHOULD send Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable and Content-Type: application/octet-stream.
- No authentication in the protocol; public (or well-hidden) data only.
- Protocol versioning is independent of server/SDK semver; breaking wire changes require new protocol tags in fetchurl/spec.

## Optional

- This website repository: https://github.com/fetchurl/website
- Org profile README: https://github.com/fetchurl/.github/blob/main/profile/README.md
